form.label: Deep Neural Network Regressor
form.description: Deprecation note: this dashboard and associated algorithms got deprecated due to consolidation efforts and to improve DSDL app experience. You can still make this example work by building a custom container image. Please refer to the public DSDL github repository.

html.p: This example shows a simple regression using the TensorFlow Deep Neural Network (DNN) estimator class

search.query: | multireport [| score r2_score median_house_value against predicted_median_house_value] [| score mean_squared_error median_house_value against predicted_median_house_value] | stats max(mean_squared_error) as mean_squared_error max(r2_score) as r2_score

| inputlookup housing.csv | fit StandardScaler "crime_rate" "land_zone" "nitric_oxide_concentration" "avg_rooms_per_dwelling" "units_prior_1940" "distance_to_employment_center" "highway_accessibility_index" "property_tax_rate" "pupil_teacher_ratio" with_mean=t with_std=t | fit AITKContainer algo=dnn_regressor epochs=$epochs$ batch_size=16 "median_house_value" from SS_* into app:housing_dnn_regressor_scaled
